results.title: Inside Scotland’s horror World Cup with shocking shot stats, McTominay going missing and boss Clarke’s meltdown blasted
results.description: THE heartbreak continues for the Tartan Army after a dismal 3-0 defeat to Brazil in their final group game. Steve Clarke's Scots look as if they may become the latest side not to make the knockout rounds - despite the extended 48-team format. History repeated itself in Group C as the Scots found themselves partnered...
